classes.reasoning: This document is explicitly titled 'eTMF-002 — SITE INITIATION PACKAGE' and contains a Site Initiation Visit (SIV) confirmation checklist covering protocol review, ICF confirmation, eCRF training, IMP storage, SAE reporting, lab accreditation, delegation log, and site activation. It is a regulated Trial Master File document that does not fit any more specific category.

summary: This is a Site Initiation Package (eTMF document) for site ES-01 (Hospital Universitario Ramón y Cajal, Madrid, Spain) documenting the Site Initiation Visit conducted on 22 March 2023 for study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001. The document confirms completion of all site activation requirements including protocol review, ICF confirmation, eCRF training, IMP storage inspection, delegation log signing, and other essential SIV activities, resulting in site activation and first patient enrollment on 05 April 2023.
